▸ **getProjects**(`tree`): `Map`\<`string`, [`ProjectConfiguration`](/docs/reference/devkit/ProjectConfiguration)\>

Get a map of all projects in a workspace.

Use [readProjectConfiguration](/docs/reference/devkit/readProjectConfiguration) if only one project is needed.

#### Parameters

| Name | Type |
| :------ | :------ |
| `tree` | [`Tree`](/docs/reference/devkit/Tree) |

#### Returns

`Map`\<`string`, [`ProjectConfiguration`](/docs/reference/devkit/ProjectConfiguration)\>
